summary: Frontend testing completed for global hamburger drawer menu feature. All 10 requested features verified and working correctly. The DrawerMenu component is properly integrated into MobileLayout for all student pages, with correct z-index (z-[60]) for visibility over blue headers. Teacher and Admin roles correctly use the old Layout with Header + Sidebar.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - demo app with role selection at /
seed_data_creation: Set je_course_purchased=true in localStorage to test course module pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Drawer menu is implemented in HamburgerMenu.jsx and included globally in MobileLayout.jsx. Student pages all have the drawer button (data-testid='drawer-menu-btn') visible at fixed position top-left. Teacher/Admin use old Layout.jsx with Header+Sidebar. Course module access requires je_course_purchased=true in localStorage. Key data-testids: drawer-menu-btn, drawer-overlay, drawer-panel, drawer-close-btn, drawer-nav, drawer-logout-btn, drawer-item-{inicio|entrenamiento|retos|curso|perfil|notificaciones}, header-menu-btn (for old Layout).

student_home_drawer_visible.details: Drawer button (hamburger icon) is visible at top-left corner (fixed position) over the blue header on /inicio

drawer_opens_from_left.details: Clicking drawer button opens drawer from left with overlay (z-[70]). Shows user name/role at top, 6 menu items (Inicio, Entrenamiento, Retos, Curso, Perfil, Notificaciones), and 'Volver al inicio' at bottom

drawer_navigation_works.details: Clicking menu items navigates to correct routes and closes drawer automatically. Active item is highlighted with accent color and blue dot indicator

drawer_on_practice_page.details: Drawer button visible on /entrenamiento/practica with chess board

drawer_on_course_module.details: Drawer button visible on /curso/modulo/1 with correct z-index (z-[60]) - button appears over the blue course header and drawer opens correctly

drawer_close_methods.details: Drawer closes via: X button click, overlay click (outside drawer), clicking nav item to navigate

teacher_has_sidebar.details: Teacher role at /teacher uses old Layout with Header + Sidebar. Header has mobile hamburger button (data-testid='header-menu-btn') that opens sidebar with Panel, Alumnos, Tareas navigation

admin_has_sidebar.details: Admin role at /admin uses old Layout with Header + Sidebar. No drawer menu button present - uses header-menu-btn instead

drawer_active_states.details: Menu items correctly highlight based on current route: Inicio active on /inicio, Entrenamiento active on /entrenamiento, Retos active on /retos, etc.

drawer_logout_button.details: 'Volver al inicio' button logs out and redirects to welcome screen at /

data_testid_verified.drawer-panel: Drawer panel sliding from left (z-[70], w-72)
